description_long: This is a cylindrical, dark brown leather handbag with a rugged, weathered appearance, featuring visible scuff marks and worn patches along the edges. The bag is secured by two prominent leather straps that run vertically across the front and over the top, each fastened with a metal buckle. The sides of the bag are rounded, and the stitching is visible along the seams, adding to its vintage, utilitarian look. The main compartment is accessed by lifting the front flap, which is held down by the straps and buckles. The leather surface has a pebbled texture, and the hardware appears to be made of darkened metal. The overall design suggests durability and practicality, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A rugged, cylindrical dark brown leather handbag with two front buckled straps and a weathered, vintage finish. The bag features a pebbled texture and visible stitching, emphasizing its utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two leather straps with metal buckles and the main flap closure, highlighting the worn texture and scuff marks.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the rounded end of the bag, the thickness of the leather, and the continuation of the straps over the top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the uninterrupted leather surface with the two straps running vertically, and visible seam lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the rounded end and the edge of the flap, with strap and buckle details.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed leather straps with metal buckles, attached vertically and designed for securing the flap rather than carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Dual metal buckles on leather straps securing a front flap closure.
